'''Kyl Ransen''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed [[Polith system]] during the early years of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After witnessing the virtual subjugation of the [[Vratix/Legends|Vratix]] people on [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]] as a youth, he vowed to help them when he grew older.<ref name="The Business of Bacta" />

{{Char-stub}}
